zh.Groton, New London, Connecticut, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham是John William Cunningham的兒子，於1742年出生在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托。他於1762年與Lucy Hutchinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1800年住在美國紐約州奧瑟格皮德特斯費爾德。他去世於1806年在美國紐約州奧瑟格武納迪拉亞武納迪拉亞享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham是John William Cunningham的儿子，于1742年出生在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托。他于1762年与Lucy Hutchinson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1800年住在美国纽约州奧瑟格皮德特斯費爾德。他去世于1806年在美国纽约州奧瑟格武納迪拉亞武納迪拉亞享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.
Historical Boundaries 1791: Otsego, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham was born in 1742, in Groton, New London, Connecticut, United States as the son of John William Cunningham. He married Lucy Hutchinson in 1762, in Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Pittsfield, Otsego, New York, United States in 1800. He died in 1806, in Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, United States, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham est né en 1742, à Groton, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis, fils de John William Cunningham. Il a épousé Lucy Hutchinson en 1762, à Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Pittsfield, Otsego, New York, États-Unis en 1800. Il est décédé en 1806, à Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham è nato il nel 1742 nel Groton, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America come figlio di John William Cunningham. Lui sposato Lucy Hutchinson nel 1762, nel Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Pittsfield, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1800. Morì nel 1806, nel Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunninghamは1742年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドングロトンでJohn William Cunninghamの息子として生まれた。1762年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドングロトンでLucy Hutchinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1800年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴピッツフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1806年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴウナデラウナデラで64歳で死去した。

ko.Milford, Otsego, New York, United States: 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 미퍼드 미퍼드
ko.Groton, New London, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham(은)는 1742년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴에서 John William Cunningham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1762년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴에서 Lucy Hutchinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1800년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 피츠필드에서 살았다. 그는 1806년 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 우나디라 우나디라에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham nasceu em 1742, em Groton, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América filho de John William Cunningham. Ele casou-se com Lucy Hutchinson em 1762, em Groton, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Pittsfield, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1800. Ele faleceu em 1806, em Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham родился в 1742 г. в местности гротон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Его отца звали John William Cunningham. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Hutchinson в 1762 г. в местности гротон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности питцфиелд, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1800 году. Он умер в 1806 г. в местности унадилла, унадилла, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Cunningham nació en 1742, en Groton, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos como hijo de John William Cunningham. Se casó con Lucy Hutchinson en 1762, en Groton, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Pittsfield, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1800. Murió en 1806, en Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años.
